creator: rhurlin@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi Thaddeus,

I am just playing around a bit with beta3. Commands like mdb-tables or mdb-export every time print two or more warnings before the regular output:

mdb-tables testtable.mdb
warning: row_size = 0.
warning: row_size = 0.
TABLE1 TABLE2 [...]


Could you please try if you can reproduce this?
